skeleton.$comment: Skeleton-shimmer composition formalised in v4.4 (00b-v4.4-token-extension brief). Composed entirely from existing v4.3 surface primitives (color.surface.muted + color.surface.subtle); zero new primitive colours. Token exists so every skeleton placeholder across the library resolves through a single gradient definition instead of each component baking its own. Standard 1.4s linear infinite shimmer keyframe lives in dist/tokens.css as a CSS utility block; @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) drops the animation.

shimmer.$description: Skeleton placeholder fill — animated via the standard 1.4s shimmer keyframe.
